{{Quote|…the only person ever to put me behind bars!|[[Nym/Legends|Nym]]|<ref name="Starfighter" />}}
'''Vana Sage''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] during the last [[Standard century/Legends|century]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], who hindered the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==Biography==
===Fighting the Trade Federation===
{{Quote|Not long after capturing Nym, Sage found out that the Trade Federation had a put out a contract for her termination. After that, well, the enemy of your enemy is your friend. I guess Nym thought it was a good idea to keep Sage close to help avoid being imprisoned in the future. Ah, I'm not doing the story justice. Let's just say that Nym and Sage busted a lot of Trade Federation heads.|[[Choster]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:SwC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Speak with Choster|Lok}}</ref>}}
[[File:VanaSage.png|thumb|left|200px|Vana Sage]]
Sage left her home [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] at fifteen to become a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. She served for a time with the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Security Forces]], but left in disgust after her attempts to get the Naboo to increase their weak defenses were rebuffed.<ref name="SPOSG" /> As she grew older, Sage became a mercenary and took a job as a "troubleshooter" for the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], testing the abilities of new Trade Federation equipment. Around this time, she contracted a rogue [[Xi Char/Legends|Xi Char]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] to create the ''[[Guardian Mantis]]''. She also obtained the [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] of the [[Feeorin/Legends|Feeorin]] pirate [[Nym/Legends|Nym]].

[[File:Mantis_swsf.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Sage's personal starfighter, the ''Guardian Mantis'']]
While testing the [[Scarab-class starfighter/Legends|Scarab]] craft, she intercepted an incriminating transmission sent to the Trade Federation. The federation then attempted to have her terminated. She soon teamed up with [[Bravo Squadron/Legends|Bravo Pilot]] [[Rhys Dallows]] and [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] to stop the Federation's invasion of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

Following the battle, Sage accepted a pardon from the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] and a position in the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. In [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], at the request of [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]], she compiled information on Nym to be sent to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]].

[[22 BBY/Legends|Two years later]], Sage reunited with Nym in time to help the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]] reclaim their base on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]] from Trade Federation forces under [[Cavik Toth]]'s command. Following that battle, Sage departed to track down [[Reti]], last seen fleeing the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] to regions unknown.

===Galactic Civil War===
{{Quote|Ah, yes! Vana Sage. Always on top of security for Nym. I'm not sure why she sticks with those Lok Revenants, though. Did you ever hear how Sage met Nym? Funny story.|Choster, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:SwC" />}}
[[File:Vana_Sages_Emblem.svg|thumb|left|150px|Vana Sage's symbol]]
After the defeat of the Trade Federation, Vana Sage stayed with the Lok Revenants,<ref name="SWG:SwC" /> serving as Nym's head of security for years.<ref name="SWG:MVS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Meet Vana Sage|Lok}}</ref> Following the Clone Wars, Nym assumed the leadership of the planet Lok and ruled the planet for decades. At the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Lok had fallen under the control of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but Nym remained the effective ruler of the planet.<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|65|Who's Who in Star Wars Galaxies|Who's Who in ''Star Wars'' Galaxies}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Vana Sage discovered that an Imperial [[Starship/Legends|starship]] had crashed-landed in the deserts of Lok after it took off from a secret [[Imperial Mine (Lok)|Imperial mining installation]] on the planet. As the Revenants had never been able to infiltrate the Imperial mine, Sage realized that the cargo could contain valuable information regarding Imperial activities on Lok. However, the cargo of the crashed ship was soon salvaged by enemies of the Lok Revenants, the [[Sulfur Lake Pirates]].<ref name="SWG:MVS" />

[[File:Lok_Revenants_leaders_2.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Vana Sage with the other leaders of the Lok Revenants]]
Vana Sage therefore organized an operation to raid the [[Sulfur Lake Pirate Hideout]]. She recruited a group of skilled spacers who recently arrived on Lok and asked them to join the Lok Revenants.<ref name="SWG:MVS" /> Using the knowledge of the engineer [[Choster]], the spacers broke through the defenses of the hideout and attacked the pirates. Finally, they collected the [[memory module]] of an Imperial [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that was present in the crashed ship and brought it back to Vana Sage.<ref name="SWG:RtDD">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Retrieve the Droid Disk|Lok}}</ref>

Following the attack on the Sulfur Lake Pirate Hideout, the tensions between the Lok Revenants and the Sulfur Lake Pirates turned to open war. After some setbacks,<ref name="SWG:NP">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Negotiate Peace|Lok}}</ref> the pirates set up an elaborate plan to directly attack Nym in [[Nym's Base|his palace]]. They hijacked a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] carrying an envoy of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooinan]] politicians to a meeting with Nym. As the shuttle landed in the courtyard of Nym's palace, Nym and the other leaders of the Lok Revenants—Vana Sage, [[Kole]] and [[Jinkins]]—arrived to greet the Tatooinan envoy. A battle subsequently erupted in the palace when the Sulfur Lake Pirates emerged unexpectedly from the shuttle and attacked the Revenants. However, the superior fighting skills of Nym's henchmen allowed them to eliminate every Sulfur Lake Pirate. Nym, Vana Sage, and the other leaders of the Lok Revenants survived the attack.<ref name="SWG:E">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Envoy|Lok}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|I'm Vana Sage, second in command of security here in Keren.|Vana Sage|<ref name="SWG:LVS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Lt. Vana Sage|Naboo}}</ref>}}
[[File:Lt_Vana_Sage.png|thumb|right|200px|Vana Sage's original appearance in ''Star Wars Galaxies'', wearing a RSF uniform]]
Vana Sage was voiced by [[Lisa Fuson]] in [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] and ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''.

Vana Sage appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:MVS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> In the original release of the game, Vana Sage appeared as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of the Royal Naboo Security Forces in [[Keren/Legends|Keren]], on Naboo, where she proposed three minor quests to players.<ref name="SWG:LVS" /> This character was removed from the game upon the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Game Update 16|Game Update 16]]" on [[March 23]], [[2010]].<ref name="SonyCite-Game Update 16: ''Star Wars'' Galaxies™: Stronghold of the Lok Revenants">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=68713&month=032010|text=Game Update 16: ''Star Wars'' Galaxies™: Stronghold of the Lok Revenants}}</ref> With this update, Vana Sage was included in the revamped "[[W:c:swg:Nym's Theme Park|Nym's Theme Park]]" as the head of security of the Lok Revenants.<ref name="SWG:MVS" />
